entities.name: instagram

entities.name: pods
entities.how_described: 本集把它说成是 Instagram 今年采用的迷你小队架构：通常 4-6 名偏通才的工程师加一个产品人员，以更小核心团队替代过去十几人的庞大配置，决策更快。

evidence.quote: but this year it's changing we've adopted what we call pods
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_01

evidence.quote: so this idea of product staff so the idea is on these new pods so this is like
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_00

entities.name: 产品人员 (product staff)
entities.how_described: 本集把它说成是传统 PM 的进化版。在 AI 工具辅助下，能够顺手干一部分设计师、数据科学家和研究员工作的超级通才角色。

entities.name: news feed
entities.how_described: 本集提到它是 Facebook 的核心动态消息流，是嘉宾当年设计并主导的项目，也是他学会直面平台公共争议反噬的起点。

evidence.quote: and led the early facebook news feed he also ran the team that built
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_00

entities.name: 嵌入模型 (embedding)
entities.how_described: 本集说它是过去五到十年推动推荐算法飞跃的底层技术。它产生的是高维空间里一堆人类看不懂的巨大向量，算法据此做数学相似度匹配而非真正的语义理解。

evidence.quote: you know these large embedding models and these other techniques
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_01

evidence.quote: that is in an embedding space you can think of embedding space as a map you can map
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_01

entities.name: 探索性排名 (exploration based ranking)
entities.how_described: 本集把它说成是推荐系统的工作逻辑之一：给你推你可能根本不知道自己会喜欢的小众内容。它虽难拉动短期数据，但能帮小众创作者破圈，是 TikTok 的核心强项。

evidence.quote: then you can talk about exploration based ranking going and trying
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_01

evidence.quote: if you do the latter this exploration based ranking you can i think it's really good
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_01

entities.name: 合成内容 (synthetic content)
entities.how_described: 本集把它说成是 AI 生成内容的浪潮。认为当世界充斥海量的此类内容时，人们对真实性和独特创造力的渴求会不降反升，成为 Instagram 的顺风。

evidence.quote: of synthetic content i actually think people are going to seek out creativity
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_01

evidence.quote: where there's an abundance of synthetic content i actually think people are going
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_01

entities.name: 时间线 (chronological feed)
entities.how_described: 本集详细拆解了纯按时间排序的悖论：它会导致专业媒体刷屏淹没真实朋友，测试表明它会致使平台整体使用量与用户满意度双双大幅下降。

evidence.quote: with the chronological feed so one is and some of this is the tension between
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_01

evidence.quote: if you do a pure chronological feed the incentive for everybody is to just post
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_01

entities.name: 大型语言模型 (llms)
entities.how_described: 本集说它们赋予了那些原本无法解释的推荐向量空间以可解释性，能够用人类语言总结出某块区域代表什么，从而催生了「你的算法」功能。

evidence.quote: the underlying technology underneath llms right that's how they all
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_01

entities.name: vibe coding
entities.how_described: 本集提到嘉宾带 10 岁儿子通过自然语言指挥 AI 写代码，做出了有着 19 个关卡和商店系统的 8 位风格超级马里奥游戏。
